## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Related issue

Closes #N _(or "n/a")_

## Type of change

- [ ] `bug fix`
- [ ] `feat`
- [ ] `docs`
- [ ] `refactor`
- [ ] `test`
- [ ] `chore` / `deps`
- [ ] `i18n`
- [ ] `perf`

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` reports **No issues found!**
- [ ] `flutter test` passes (all 52 tests + any new ones)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new behavior
- [ ] Updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]` (if user-visible)
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
- [ ] Commit messages are in English, imperative mood, lowercase, no trailing period

## Scope check

This PR does **not** add:

- [ ] Firebase / Analytics / Crashlytics / cloud sync
- [ ] Accounts / login
- [ ] Voice prompts / AI features
- [ ] Heavy state management libraries (Riverpod, BLoC, GetX)
- [ ] Any new permission to `AndroidManifest.xml`
